abilities.name: Backup Plan
abilities.description: Once per encounter when an allied Digimon within 3 spaces takes damage, your partner Digimon gains +2 to their next attack roll.

abilities.name: Crowd Presence
abilities.description: Your partner Digimon gains +1 to all attack rolls for each allied Digimon currently on the field, up to a maximum of +3.

abilities.name: Take the Hit
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Friendship rank 4
abilities.description: Once per encounter when an allied Digimon within 2 spaces would take damage, your partner Digimon may take that damage instead.

abilities.name: Group Momentum
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Friendship rank 4
abilities.description: Once per encounter at the start of your turn, if at least two allied Digimon acted last round, your partner Digimon gains temporary HP equal to your Friendship rank.

abilities.name: Thunder Formation
abilities.description: Once per encounter as a Basic Action, choose one allied Digimon within 3 spaces. Until the start of your next turn that Digimon gains +3 to their damage resistance.

abilities.name: Never Alone
abilities.description: Once per session when your partner Digimon would trigger the defeat cascade, you may spend 6 Hope to prevent it if there is at least one other allied Digimon still on the field.

abilities.name: For Everyone
abilities.description: Once per session at the start of an encounter, all allied Digimon and Tamers on the field — including yourself — gain temporary HP equal to your Friendship rank x3.
